mnemonics.title: PWM Parameters
mnemonics.content: FDR - Frequency, Duty cycle, Resolution - the three key parameters of PWM motor control

mnemonics.title: Servo Pulse Widths
mnemonics.content: 0-90-180: 1-1.5-2 - 1ms for 0°, 1.5ms for 90°, 2ms for 180° in standard servos

mnemonics.title: H-Bridge States
mnemonics.content: FARM - Forward, Active Brake, Reverse, Motor Coast - the four basic operating states of an H-bridge
